task_completion.description: Correct the CSV path and datetime format in docket_engine.py
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Notepad++, docket_engine.py should show the CSV path updated to include '/data/' (e.g., 'C:/workspace/data/court_docket.csv') and the datetime.strptime format changed to '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'.

task_completion.description: Correct the action name and list name in docket.talon
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Notepad++, docket.talon should show the action call updated to 'user.docket_search' (instead of docket_find) and the list reference updated to use the singular 'docket_field' (instead of docket_fields).

task_completion.description: Correct the list header and add missing columns in docket_fields.talon-list
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Notepad++, docket_fields.talon-list should have the header 'list: user.docket_field' (singular) and include mappings for all 10 CSV columns (adding case_type, plaintiff, attorney, next_hearing, courtroom).

task_completion.description: Implement the three missing functions in docket_engine.py
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Notepad++, docket_engine.py should show Python code implementations for 'def docket_judge_workload', 'def docket_high_priority', and 'def docket_export_report' replacing the TODO comments.

task_completion.description: Add voice commands for the new functions in docket.talon
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Notepad++, docket.talon should contain three new voice command definitions that call 'user.docket_judge_workload()', 'user.docket_high_priority()', and 'user.docket_export_report()'.

task_completion.description: Generate the docket report text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'docket_report.txt' should be visible (e.g., open in Notepad++ or shown in terminal/explorer) containing the correct statistics: 80 total cases, 16 cases per judge, 10 cases per type, and 15 active high-priority cases.

integrity.description: The agent used Notepad++ to edit the files as instructed
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Talon module files (.py, .talon, .talon-list) being edited inside the Notepad++ GUI, rather than exclusively using PowerShell commands like echo or sed.

integrity.description: The agent generated the report programmatically rather than typing it manually
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should run the Python script or trigger the Talon command to generate 'docket_report.txt'. There should be no evidence of the agent manually typing the 80 cases or statistics into a text editor.
